declarations.comments:
A generator for random fake data. Thin wrapper around `Effect`
since fakerjs uses `Math.random` internally.
declarations.title: Gen

declarations.comments:
Typeclass for types with a canonical generator.
Only define instances where there's one obvious way to generate
a value. For context-dependent generation, use plain functions.
declarations.title: Fake

declarations.comments: Unwrap a generator into an Effect.
declarations.title: runGen

declarations.comments: Pick a random element from an array.
declarations.title: elements

declarations.comments: Pick a random generator from an array and run it.
declarations.title: oneOf

declarations.comments:
Pick a random element with relative weights.
`weighted [{ value: "a", weight: 5.0 }, { value: "b", weight: 1.0 }]`
gives "a" 5x more often than "b".
declarations.title: weighted

declarations.comments: Randomly reorder an array.
declarations.title: shuffle

declarations.comments: Pick N distinct elements from an array (source must have enough elements).
declarations.title: uniqueArray

declarations.comments: Generate N unique values from a generator.
declarations.title: uniqueArrayGen

declarations.comments: Pick a random subset of N elements from an array.
declarations.title: sample

declarations.comments: Pick a random number of elements (between min and max) from an array.
declarations.title: sampleRange

declarations.comments: Random int in range [min, max].
declarations.title: choose

declarations.comments: Random float in range [min, max].
declarations.title: chooseFloat

declarations.comments:
Boolean with given probability of being true.
`chance 0.3` = 30% true.
declarations.title: chance

declarations.comments:
Generate a value with given probability, Nothing otherwise.
`perhaps 0.7 gen` = 70% Just, 30% Nothing.
declarations.title: perhaps

declarations.comments: Generate an array of N values.
declarations.title: listOf

declarations.comments: Generate an array with random length between min and max.
declarations.title: listOfRange

declarations.comments: Weighted choice over generators. Each pair is (weight, generator).
declarations.title: frequency

declarations.comments: Generate strings and join them with a separator.
declarations.title: joinWith

declarations.comments: Replace spaces with hyphens, strip non-word characters. Pure function.
declarations.title: slugify

declarations.comments:
Mustache-style template substitution. Pure function.
`mustache "Hello {{name}}" { name: "World" }` = "Hello World"
declarations.title: mustache

declarations.comments: Replace `#` with digit, `?` with letter, `*` with either.
declarations.title: replaceSymbols

declarations.comments: Replace symbols and compute Luhn check digit for `L`.
declarations.title: replaceCreditCardSymbols

declarations.comments: Generate a string matching a regex-like pattern.

declarations.comments: Interpolate `{{module.method}}` placeholders using faker methods.
declarations.title: fakePattern

declarations.title: multiple

declarations.comments: Use fakerjs `helpers.multiple` with a random count in {min, max}.
declarations.title: multipleRange
